title: Welcome to the Black Parade
why_this_song: Welcome to the Black Parade by My Chemical Romance (2006) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 18 times; first heard in: "We'll carry on, we'll carry on"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "We'll carry on, we'll carry on"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Do or die, you'll never make me"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Do or die, you'll never make me"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "And when you're gone, we want you all to know"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "carry" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "carry" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "we'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "we'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When I was a young boy

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: My father took me into the city
Your misery and hate will kill us all
Because the world will never take my heart

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Welcome to the Black Parade" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Welcome to the Black Parade"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask My Chemical Romance one question about "Welcome to the Black Parade", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para My Chemical Romance sobre "Welcome to the Black Parade", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Welcome to the Black Parade" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Welcome to the Black Parade" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
